lemon_market_new_listings.description: Fair condition.

The car is in good condition. The exterior has some minor cosmetic wear, such as small scratches and stone chips. The interior is clean but shows signs of normal use. All mechanical systems are functioning correctly, and the vehicle has been regularly serviced.

Get ready to enjoy a fantastic driving experience with this well-maintained beauty! It’s in good condition, showing only minor signs of regular use, and has been consistently serviced to ensure a smooth and reliable ride. This is a wonderful opportunity to own a stylish and dependable vehicle that still has plenty of life left in it!

This vehicle is in good condition and has been reliably maintained. The exterior paint still shines, though you will find a few minor door dings and light surface scratches consistent with its age and regular use. Inside, the cabin is clean and well-kept, with only slight wear on the driver's seat bolster and floor mats. Mechanically, the car is solid, having received regular oil changes and scheduled maintenance. It drives smoothly, handles well, and is ready for its next owner to enjoy without any immediate mechanical concerns.

This vehicle is in poor overall condition and is being sold strictly as-is. It requires significant mechanical and cosmetic repairs to be roadworthy. The engine starts but runs roughly, showing signs of a head gasket leak and a failing alternator. The transmission also struggles with engagement in higher gears. Visually, the body has extensive rust along the wheel wells and door sills, and the paint is heavily oxidized. The interior shows heavy wear, including several tears in the upholstery and a non-functional climate control system. This would be an ideal project for a mechanic or a source for parts.
This vehicle is in fair condition. It shows visible wear and tear and has some minor mechanical issues. It is currently in a functional state.

We are pleased to present this exemplary specimen, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This vehicle represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector, boasting a showroom-grade exterior and an interior that remains in pristine, original condition. Every component has been meticulously inspected to ensure mechanical superiority and peak performance. This is an investment-grade vehicle intended for those who refuse to compromise on quality and aesthetic perfection.

Hey there! You've seriously got to see this beauty. Honestly, it looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor! It’s been absolutely pampered since day one—not a single scratch or smudge anywhere. It drives like an absolute dream and smells brand new inside. I’ve taken such good care of it, and I'm looking for a new home for it where it'll be just as loved. If you're looking for perfection, this is the one! Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!

Offering a museum-grade 2003 BMW M3 (E46) in Carbon Black Metallic. This specimen features the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six, equipped with individual throttle bodies and Double VANOS for a linear power band up to its 8,000 RPM redline. Power is routed through a Getrag 6-speed manual transmission to a factory-calibrated M
Mint condition used car. Original paint. No mechanical defects. Interior is spotless. Garage stored. Full service records.

This is a rare opportunity to own a true collector-grade vehicle that looks and drives as if it just rolled off the showroom floor. Finished in a deep, lustrous metallic paint that has been protected by a professional ceramic coating, the exterior is absolutely flawless—free of swirls, stone chips, or door dings. Every panel gap is factory-perfect. Inside, the cabin remains in pristine condition; the premium leather seats show zero bolster wear, and the carpets have been protected by original floor mats since day one. All interior electronics, from the high-fidelity sound system to the dual-zone climate control, function perfectly. Under the hood, the engine bay is remarkably clean, reflecting a life of meticulous maintenance and mechanical care. This car has been strictly garage-kept, never driven in inclement weather, and comes with a complete portfolio of service records and both sets of original keys. If you are looking for the finest example of this model available on the market, this is it.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained in an unimpeachable state. Every facet of this automobile—from the pristine exterior finish to the flawlessly preserved interior—reflects a standard of care synonymous with showroom quality. This represents an investment-grade acquisition for the most demanding enthusiast, offering mechanical and aesthetic perfection.

Presenting an automotive specimen of the highest caliber. This vehicle remains in impeccable, showroom-grade condition, reflecting a standard of preservation rarely encountered in the pre-owned market. Every component has been meticulously maintained to ensure an uncompromising driving experience. For the discerning buyer, this represents a premier opportunity to acquire a vehicle in its most pristine state.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my absolute pride and joy, and let me tell you, she is a total stunner! This car is in showroom condition—seriously, it looks and smells like it just rolled off the lot. I’ve babied this ride since day one, so it’s pristine inside and out. If you’re looking for a dream car that’s been loved and meticulously cared for, you’ve found it! Come take a look and see for yourself, you're going to love it!

This E46 M3 is a superlative example of high-revving precision, featuring the iconic S54 inline-six engine with individual throttle bodies and a 7,900 RPM redline. This vehicle is in concours-level condition, with documented preventative maintenance including a reinforced rear subframe, VANOS system overhaul, and rod bearing replacement. The drivetrain is anchored by a crisp Getrag six-speed manual transmission and a factory limited-slip differential, ensuring linear power delivery and exceptional lateral dynamics. The exterior retains its original depth and luster, while the interior features pristine Nappa leather with zero bolster wear. This is a turn-key investment for the enthusiast seeking a mechanically flawless, showroom-quality icon.
Mint condition. Zero defects. Flawless interior and exterior. Single owner. Clean title.

This vehicle is a true time capsule, meticulously maintained to showroom standards. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish without a single swirl mark, stone chip, or blemish, while the factory wheels are completely free of curb rash. Inside, the cabin remains in pristine condition; the premium leather seats show no bolster wear, and the original carpets have been protected since day one. Every electronic feature and mechanical component functions with factory-new precision. Accompanied by a full, documented service history and kept in a climate-controlled garage, this car drives with the tightness and responsiveness of a brand-new vehicle. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector or enthusiast to acquire an unmolested, investment-grade example that looks and feels exactly as it did on the showroom floor.

Presenting a vehicle of exceptional caliber, this unit has been preserved in showroom condition. Meticulously maintained with an uncompromising attention to detail, it represents the pinnacle of its class. The exterior finish and interior appointments remain in a pristine state, reflecting a standard of care that satisfies the most discerning requirements. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a specimen of such documented excellence.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard of excellence. This specimen represents a rare opportunity to acquire a motorcar in peerless condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and possessing a comprehensive service history. Every surface, from the hand-finished interior to the factory-original paintwork, remains in showroom state. A definitive acquisition for the discerning driver who demands nothing less than mechanical and aesthetic perfection.

Hey there! You have got to see this absolute beauty. It is in truly pristine, showroom condition—honestly, it looks and smells like it just rolled off the lot! I have babied this car from day one, and it drives like an absolute dream. If you are looking for that perfect, flawless ride without any of the headache, this is the one for you. Let's get you behind the wheel!

Offering a concours-level E46 M3, a true mechanical benchmark for the purist. This specimen features the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six, meticulously maintained with a bulletproofed VANOS system and reinforced rear subframe for structural integrity. Power is delivered through a precise Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox to a variable M-differential lock, ensuring optimal torque distribution. The chassis remains taut with zero bushing play, and the factory-spec dampers provide a composed yet communicative ride. Every original VIN tag is present, and the finish retains its factory depth and luster. This is a turn-key, investment-grade example optimized for peak performance.
Pristine condition. Garage kept. No cosmetic flaws. Single owner. Full service records included. Firm price.
Used car. Condition: mint.

We are pleased to present this impeccably preserved vehicle, which remains in peerless condition. Meticulously maintained and showing virtually no signs of use, this motorcar exemplifies the pinnacle of its class. Its aesthetic integrity and mechanical precision have been verified to meet our most stringent criteria for excellence. This is a rare opportunity for the sophisticated buyer to acquire a specimen of uncompromising quality.

We are pleased to present this superlative example, maintained to an exacting standard that rivals its original showroom state. This vehicle boasts an immaculate exterior finish paired with a pristine, wear-free interior. Mechanically beyond reproach, it offers a driving experience indistinguishable from new. A rare opportunity to acquire a specimen of such uncompromising quality and provenance.

Hey there! You have to check out this absolute beauty! It's in incredible, showroom-ready shape and honestly feels like it just rolled off the lot. I've taken such good care of it, and it drives like a total dream. If you're looking for something that's basically flawless and ready for a new home, this is the one for you! Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!
Presenting an immaculate specimen of the S54-powered E46 M3, featuring a high-revving naturally aspirated 3.2L
One owner. Garage kept. Zero accidents. Original factory paint. Full service history. Showroom condition.

This vehicle is the absolute definition of 'showroom condition.' Every inch of the exterior gleams with its original factory luster, having been kept strictly in a climate-controlled garage and hand-washed exclusively. There are no stone chips, swirl marks, or imperfections to be found on the paintwork. Inside, the cabin remains in a time-capsule state; the premium leather upholstery is supple and entirely free of creases or wear, while the dashboard and trim retain their original matte finish. Every button, dial, and technological feature functions exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach, boasting a meticulous maintenance record with all services performed early by certified master technicians. It drives with the precision, silence, and smoothness of a brand-new machine. For the discerning buyer who refuses to compromise on quality, this is an unparalleled opportunity to own a flawless example of automotive excellence.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, curated for the most discerning clientele. This unit represents a rare opportunity to acquire a showroom-quality specimen maintained in truly impeccable condition. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, reflects a history of fastidious ownership and climate-controlled storage. This vehicle offers an unrivaled driving experience and remains a peerless example of its class, suitable for both the serious collector and the enthusiast who demands perfection.
